Templates for bug reports, feature requests, and configuration for issue reporting in Flask.


## Files
- **[bug-report.md](bug-report.md.md)**: Template for reporting bugs in Flask, including sections for replication steps and environment details.
- **[config.yml](config.yml.md)**: Configuration for GitHub issue templates, disabling blank issues and providing contact links for security and questions.
- **[feature-request.md](feature-request.md.md)**: Template for submitting feature requests to suggest new features for Flask.
